hypothesis: If MatAgent integrates LLM-driven planning and proposition with external tools (short-term memory, long-term memory, periodic table, knowledge base), DiffCSP for structure estimation, and iComFormer for property evaluation, then it will generate inorganic compositions and crystal structures with a higher success rate (within ±0.25 eV/atom of target formation energies) and greater compositional validity, uniqueness, and novelty than tool-free LLMs and MatterGen, because iterative tool-guided retrieval, memory, and feedback improve proposal quality and convergence.
